# mapbox_style (Resource)

Manages a Mapbox style. Styles define the visual appearance of maps, including sources, layers, and rendering rules.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "mapbox_style" "example" {
  name    = "My Custom Style"
  version = 8

  sources = jsonencode({
    "mapbox-streets" = {
      type = "vector"
      url  = "mapbox://mapbox.mapbox-streets-v8"
    }
  })

  layers = jsonencode([
    {
      id   = "background"
      type = "background"
      paint = {
        "background-color" = "#f8f4f0"
      }
    }
  ])

  visibility = "private"
}

output "style_id" {
  value = mapbox_style.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the style.

### Optional

- `layers` (String) A JSON string defining the map layers and rendering rules. Use `jsonencode()` in your Terraform configuration to construct this value.
- `metadata` (String) A JSON string containing arbitrary style metadata.
- `sources` (String) A JSON string defining the map data sources. Maximum 15 sources. Use `jsonencode()` in your Terraform configuration to construct this value.
- `version` (Number) The Mapbox style specification version. Defaults to `8`.
- `visibility` (String) The visibility of the style: `public` or `private`.

### Read-Only

- `created` (String) The ISO 8601 timestamp when the style was created.
- `draft` (Boolean) Whether the style has unpublished changes.
- `glyphs` (String) The font glyphs URL, automatically set by the Mapbox API.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the style.
- `modified` (String) The ISO 8601 timestamp when the style was last modified.
- `owner` (String) The username of the style owner.
- `protected` (Boolean) Whether the style is protected from editing.
- `sprite` (String) The sprite URL, automatically set by the Mapbox API.

## Import

Import is supported using the following syntax:

The [`terraform import` command](https://developer.hashicorp.com/terraform/cli/commands/import) can be used, for example:

```shell
terraform import mapbox_style.example <style_id>
```
